name: Avgolemono Soup (Chicken-lemon Soup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring the chicken stock to a boil in a large saucepan.
2. Add the rice, cover and simmer over low heat for 20 minutes.
3. In a mixing bowl, beat the eggs.
4. Whip the lemon juice into the egg mixture.
5. Continuously whisk the lemon-egg mixture while adding 2 cups of hot stock, without the rice.
6. Just before serving, stir in the remaining rice and chicken stock, continuously whisking as you heat the soup over a medium-low burner. Do not boil the soup or the eggs will curdle.
7. Add the salt.
8. Let the soup stand covered off the burner for 5 minutes.
